narrative:
Cols 75-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,766 registered voters, with 65.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.1 percentage points.
